#  Export a Commitment to ERP 
##### ERP DOCUMENTATION
**Each Procore-built ERP integration offers its own unique feature set.** Your integration might not support the action described on this page.
To learn about your integration and its supported features, see [Which ERP integrations are supported by Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-erp-integrations-are-supported-by-procore)
##  Background 
If you want to export commitments to your ERP system, you first need to create them in your Procore project. 
After a commitment is placed in the 'Approved' status, an Accounting Approver can export it to your ERP system, if that function is supported by your ERP integration. 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' on the company's ERP Integrations tool.  
AND
    * The person's account must be granted the 'Can Push to Accounting' privilege in the Company Directory. See [Grant Accounting Approver Privileges](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/grant-accounting-approver-privileges).


##  Steps 
To export a commitment from Procore to your ERP system, complete these tasks:
  1. [Send a Commitment to ERP Integrations for Accounting Acceptance](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/send-a-commitment-to-erp-integrations-for-accounting-acceptance)
  2. [Accept or Reject a Commitment for Export to ERP](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/accept-or-reject-a-commitment-for-export-to-erp)


## See Also
  * [Retrieve a Commitment from ERP Integrations Before Acceptance](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/retrieve-a-commitment-from-erp-integrations-before-acceptance)
  * [Accept or Reject a Commitment for Export to ERP](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/accept-or-reject-a-commitment-for-export-to-erp)
  * [Send a Commitment to ERP Integrations for Accounting Acceptance](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/send-a-commitment-to-erp-integrations-for-accounting-acceptance)


In Procore, an _Accounting Approver_ is an individual with the authority to accept and reject Procore data for export to an integrated ERP system. Accounting approvers can unlink several item types, such as commitments, commitment change orders, prime contract change orders, and subcontractor invoices, that have been synced between Procore and an integrated ERP system. See [Which ERP Integrations are supported by Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-erp-integrations-are-supported-by-procore)
title: Export a Commitment to ERP
description: How to export a commitment (e.g., a subcontract or purchase order) created in Procore to your integrated ERP system.
